SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-28-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-28-2025 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DOLORES BASTIAN DALTON. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF THE 3G'S INVESTMENTS LLC (GAYLE HART) IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CITY VIEW COMMISSARY (CATHAIR DONAGHY) IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-28-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE 3G'S INVESTMENTS LLC DBA THE GEEZ FREEZE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY VIEW COMMISSARY $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,000.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
